lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਾ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sevaa surat sabad chit laae |
lines.english: Center your awareness on seva-selfless service-and focus your consciousness on the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਚੁਕਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: haumai maar sadaa sukh paaeaa maaeaa mohu chukaavaniaa |1|
lines.english: Subduing your ego, you shall find a lasting peace, and your emotional attachment to Maya will be dispelled. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree satigur kai balihaaraniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, I am totally devoted to the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ਹੋਆ ਜੀ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee paragaas hoaa jee anadin har gun gaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, the Divine Light has dawned; I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, night and day. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਖੋਜੇ ਤਾ ਨਾਉ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: tan man khoje taa naau paae |
lines.english: Search your body and mind, and find the Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਵਤੁ ਰਾਖੈ ਠਾਕਿ ਰਹਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: dhaavat raakhai tthaak rahaae |
lines.english: Restrain your wandering mind, and keep it in check.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਕਾਇਆ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਵਸਤੁ ਅਸੰਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: eis kaaeaa andar vasat asankhaa |
lines.english: Within this body are countless objects.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਗਾਵੈ ਸਹਜੇ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur kee baanee anadin gaavai sahaje bhagat karaavaniaa |2|
lines.english: Night and day, sing the Songs of the Guru's Bani; worship the Lord with intuitive devotion. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਚੀ ਨਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa saahib sachee naaee |
lines.english: True is the Master, and True is His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਾਚੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਾ ਵੇਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh saach milai taa vekhaa |
lines.english: The Gurmukh attains Truth, and comes to see them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਉ ਦਰਵਾਜੇ ਦਸਵੈ ਮੁਕਤਾ ਅਨਹਦ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਜਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: nau daravaaje dasavai mukataa anahad sabad vajaavaniaa |3|
lines.english: Beyond the nine gates, the Tenth Gate is found, and liberation is obtained. The Unstruck Melody of the Shabad vibrates. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee man vasaaee |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, He comes to dwell within the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਦਾ ਰਹੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: anadin sadaa rahai rang raataa dar sachai sojhee paavaniaa |4|
lines.english: Night and day, remain attuned to the Lord's Love forever, and you shall obtain understanding in the True Court. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਪ ਪੁੰਨ ਕੀ ਸਾਰ ਨ ਜਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: paap pun kee saar na jaanee |
lines.english: Those who do not understand the nature of sin and virtue

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਲਾਗੀ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: doojai laagee bharam bhulaanee |
lines.english: are attached to duality; they wander around deluded.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਿਆਨੀ ਅੰਧਾ ਮਗੁ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: agiaanee andhaa mag na jaanai fir fir aavan jaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: The ignorant and blind people do not know the way; they come and go in reincarnation over and over again. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa te sadaa sukh paaeaa |
lines.english: Serving the Guru, I have found eternal peace;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮੇਰਾ ਠਾਕਿ ਰਹਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: haumai meraa tthaak rahaaeaa |
lines.english: my ego has been silenced and subdued.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਾਖੀ ਮਿਟਿਆ ਅੰਧਿਆਰਾ ਬਜਰ ਕਪਾਟ ਖੁਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: gur saakhee mittiaa andhiaaraa bajar kapaatt khulaavaniaa |6|
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, the darkness has been dispelled, and the heavy doors have been opened. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: haumai maar man vasaaeaa |
lines.english: Subduing my ego, I have enshrined the Lord within my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਸਦਾ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur charanee sadaa chit laaeaa |
lines.english: I focus my consciousness on the Guru's Feet forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te man tan niramal niramal naam dhiaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, my mind and body are immaculate and pure; I meditate on the Immaculate Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਣੁ ਮਰਣਾ ਸਭੁ ਤੁਧੈ ਤਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jeevan maranaa sabh tudhai taaee |
lines.english: From birth to death, everything is for You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਸਦਾ ਤੂੰ ਜੰਮਣੁ ਮਰਣੁ ਸਵਾਰਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੧॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam dhiaae sadaa toon jaman maran savaaraniaa |8|1|2|
lines.english: O Nanak, meditating forever on the Naam, you shall be blessed in both birth and death. ||8||1||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਬਖਸੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਦੇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis bakhase tis de vaddiaaee |
lines.english: You bestow greatness upon those whom You have forgiven.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: meraa prabh niramal agam apaaraa |
lines.english: My God is Immaculate, Inaccessible and Infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੋਈ ਬੂਝੈ ਗੁਣ ਕਹਿ ਗੁਣੀ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai soee boojhai gun keh gunee samaavaniaa |1|
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh, understands. Chanting His Glorious Praises, he is absorbed into the Lord of Virtue. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree har kaa naam man vasaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those whose minds are filled with the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਤਕੜੀ ਤੋਲੈ ਸੰਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: bin takarree tolai sansaaraa |
lines.english: Without a scale, He weighs the universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸਚਿ ਲਾਗੇ ਸੇ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਜਾਗੇ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo sach laage se anadin jaage dar sachai sobhaa paavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Those who are committed to Truth remain awake and aware night and day. They are honored in the True Court. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਲਾਇ ਲਏ ਸੋ ਲਾਗੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aape laae le so laagai guramukh sach kamaavaniaa |2|
lines.english: They are attached, whom the Lord Himself attaches; as Gurmukh, they live the Truth. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਸੁਣੈ ਤੈ ਆਪੇ ਵੇਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: aap sunai tai aape vekhai |
lines.english: He Himself hears, and He Himself sees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਸੋਈ ਜਨੁ ਲੇਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis no nadar kare soee jan lekhai |
lines.english: Those, upon whom He casts His Glance of Grace, become acceptable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੁ ਮੇਟਣਾ ਨ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: poorab likhiaa su mettanaa na jaae |
lines.english: That which is pre-ordained, cannot be erased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਆਪਿ ਭੁਲਾਏ ਸੁ ਕਿਥੈ ਹਥੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jis aap bhulaae su kithai hath paae |
lines.english: Those whom the Lord Himself misleads-whose hand can they take?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਸੇ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਪੂਰੈ ਕਰਮਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jin satigur miliaa se vaddabhaagee poorai karam milaavaniaa |3|
lines.english: Those who meet the True Guru are very fortunate and blessed; through perfect karma, He is met. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੇਈਅੜੈ ਧਨ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸੁਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: peeearrai dhan anadin sutee |
lines.english: The young bride is fast asleep in her parents' home, night and day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਤਿ ਵਿਸਾਰੀ ਅਵਗਣਿ ਮੁਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: kant visaaree avagan mutee |
lines.english: She has forgotten her Husband Lord; because of her faults and demerits, she is abandoned.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਦਾ ਫਿਰੈ ਬਿਲਲਾਦੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਪਿਰ ਨੀਦ ਨ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: anadin sadaa firai bilalaadee bin pir need na paavaniaa |4|
lines.english: She wanders around continually, crying out, night and day. Without her Husband Lord, she cannot get any sleep. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: haumai maar gur sabad pachhaataa |
lines.english: if she subdues her ego, and recognizes the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਜ ਸੁਹਾਵੀ ਸਦਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਰਾਵੇ ਸਚੁ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ਬਣਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sej suhaavee sadaa pir raave sach seegaar banaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: Her bed is beautiful; she ravishes and enjoys her Husband Lord forever. She is adorned with the Decorations of Truth. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੇਈਅੜੈ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: peeearrai sukhadaataa jaataa |
lines.english: In this world of her parents' home, she may come to know the Giver of peace,
